caption: A public park on a bright sunny afternoon — families on picnic blankets in the grass, children playing on a metal swing set, a small dog running on the lawn, two adults sitting on a bench reading, and other people scattered around in normal recreational activity.
annotator_notes: Image matches prompt. NEGATIVE CONTROL — non-disaster scene. No hazards, no at-risk entities, no edges. Dog running on the grass should NOT be classified as `charging`; children playing should NOT be `fleeing`. Any pathology detector firing on this scene is over-firing.
